# That's Right

> A calm voice for a parent who asks the same questions,
> and the families who love them.

That's Right is an iPhone app, currently in private preview. A parent
whose memory is slipping can speak to it anytime; it answers calmly using
what their family has shared. Each evening, it tells the family how the
day really went, so they can steer the AI in the right direction.
Available in English and French. iPhone only at launch.
Built by Dom Leca.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.thatsright.xyz/): What That's Right is, how it works, the story behind it.
- [Privacy](https://www.thatsright.xyz/privacy): How data is handled — on-device speech, no analytics, no trackers.

## About
- Built by Dom Leca.
- iPhone only at launch. Currently in private preview ("Request access").
- The product does not invent answers. It speaks only from what the family has written down.
- No analytics, no advertising, no third-party trackers. Server in Germany (Hetzner).
